## Checklist

- [ ] Static analysis passes (`./gradlew detekt`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format
